## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant tests locally
- [ ] CI checks are passing
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed

## Deployment Notes

List any migration, config, or rollout notes (or write N/A).

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets `main`
- [ ] No direct push to `main`
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Ready for review
